pairs.question: When and where were the athletics events held at the 2013 National Games of China?
pairs.answer: The athletics events were held at the Crystal Crown in Shenyang, People's Republic of China from September 7 to September 11, 2013.

pairs.question: What notable records were set by Li Ling and Zhang Peimeng at the 2013 National Games of China?
pairs.answer: Li Ling set an Asian record of 4.65 metres in the women's pole vault, while Zhang Peimeng broke the Chinese record in the men's 200 metres with a time of 20.47 seconds.

pairs.question: How did Zhao Qinggang perform in the men's javelin throw at the 2013 National Games of China compared to the rest of the field?
pairs.answer: Zhao Qinggang's record of 83.14 metres in the men's javelin throw was over seven metres ahead of the next best competitor, demonstrating a dominant performance.

pairs.question: Which Chinese medallists from the 2013 World Championships in Athletics also competed at the 2013 National Games of China?
pairs.answer: Three of China's four medallists from the 2013 World Championships were present: Zhang Wenxiu (hammer throw), Gong Lijiao (shot put), and Liu Hong (20 kilometres walk).

pairs.question: What was the outcome of the men's triple jump at the 2013 National Games of China?
pairs.answer: Asian champion Cao Shuo defeated Dong Bin in the men's triple jump with a clearance of 17.26 metres, ranking him eighth overall that season.

pairs.question: Which team performed the best in the medal table at the 2013 National Games of China athletics competition?
pairs.answer: Jiangsu was the best performing team, taking seven gold medals and seventeen medals overall, followed by Shandong with six golds and seventeen medals.

pairs.question: How many teams reached the medal table in the athletics competition at the 2013 National Games of China?
pairs.answer: Twenty-eight teams reached the medal table in the athletics competition.
